input.background: The research department of a steel manufacturer suspects that one of the company's rolling machines is producing steel sheets with varying thickness. The thickness is modeled as a uniform random variable between 150 and 200 millimeters. Sheets with a thickness less than 160 millimeters are considered unacceptable and must be scrapped.
input.question: Graph the probability distribution of $x$, and show the mean on the horizontal axis. Also show 1- and 2-standard-deviation intervals around the mean.

output.answer:
The uniform probability distribution is

$$
f(x)=\frac{1}{d-c}=\frac{1}{200-150}=\frac{1}{50}(150 \leq x \leq 200)
$$

The graph of this function is shown in Figure 4.39. The mean and 1- and 2-standard-deviation intervals around the mean are shown on the horizontal axis.
